stringToShow="In here, you can refight bosses you've beaten. While you can bring in any equipment and skill points you've earned, along with hearts, you will be limited to the abilities you had when the boss was first fought." signSize=3
stringToShow="Your best times will also be tracked for each of them. Note that even though you may have more hearts now, each hit you take adds 5 seconds to your time." signSize=3

stringToShow="You can press the cutscene skip button in the boss rooms here to instantly reset the battle. The gods favored you here today and they have said that this does not count as a death in your records." signSize=3
stringToShow="The doors with birds on them are Zephyr's top 5 favorites." signSize=1

stringToShow="Assist Mode can be used, but the times will not be counted." signSize=1
